canonical_answer: At 0s, the person wearing a white sleeveless top holds a yellow snack package towards the camera; at 8s, they hold a small silver object near their mouth; at 12s, they display a chocolate sandwich cookie close to the lens; at 16s, they brush their teeth with a toothbrush while the other person leaves the frame.
